items.title: Introduction to Literary Studies: The Art of Reading and Writing (WE)

sections.label: Two English Courses (300+)
sections.description: Two English courses numbered 300 or above.

sections.label: Two Additional Credits
sections.description: Two credits from: additional English courses, one Creative Writing course, Spanish literature in translation (SPA-148), 1.0 ECC credit, COM-267 Environmental Communication (WE), or COM-377 Language, Power, and Social Change (WE).
